system.description:
Effect: This ability allows Aegioschusmon to change from their current form to any form of their choosing as a Simple Action. Each form has abilities associated with it.

Red (Base Form) - @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.vQgz4qcpgr5hqb5p]{Soul Turbine}

Green - @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.VdCuUivnlttNGMGP]{Absorbant}

Dark - @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.i2YkuytUf6z6fm34]{Mold Breaker}

Blue - @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.opa3H5ql9AlLSt8V]{Ray Blaster}

Holy - @UUID[Compendium.ptr2e.core-abilities.ih7pxG44Cb4nWIHB]{Righteousness}
